name: Granola- Old Recipe
recipeIngredient: 1 cup sesame oil, or vegetable oil
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large Dutch oven, combine all dry ingredients.
2. In a separate utensil, mix together honey and oil.
3. Combine the two sets of ingredients.
4. Spread on a cookie sheet.
5. Bake at 300°F for 20 minutes, or until slightly brown.
6. For larger batches, place in an oven preheated to 200°F and cook for 1 hour, stirring every 25 minutes.
7. Turn off the oven and let the cereal cool for another hour or two.
